# bLength

**Instance Property**

The size of the descriptor in bytes.

## Declaration

```swift
uint8_t bLength;
```

## Accessing the Descriptor Properties

- **bDescriptorType**: The type of the descriptor.
- **wTotalLength**: The length, in bytes, of the descriptor and all of its subdescriptors.
- **bNumDeviceCaps**: The number of separate device capability descriptors in the binary object store.
